name: HWM_TCD_EXP_DATA_PER
description: This table contains details for Time Clock Device export data for Person Object

columns.Name: PERSON_DATA_ID
columns.Comments: System generated number to uniquely represent the person data record

columns.Name: TCD_EXP_DATA_ESS_PROCESS_ID
columns.Comments: The process which generated the data.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Export or Collection Data Status

columns.Name: PERSON_DATA_VERSION
columns.Comments: Version of the person data record

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Person id

columns.Name: PERSON_NAME_ID
columns.Comments: PERSON_NAME_ID

columns.Name: NAME_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: NAME_EFFECTIVE_START_DATE

columns.Name: NAME_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: NAME_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE

columns.Name: DELETE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Used for soft delete of the row

columns.Name: FIRST_NAME
columns.Comments: Person first name

columns.Name: LAST_NAME
columns.Comments: Person last name

columns.Name: PERSON_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Person number

columns.Name: PERSON_BADGE_ID
columns.Comments: Person badge id

columns.Name: REC_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of the record like created, modified, deleted

columns.Name: LATEST_VERSION
columns.Comments: Latest version of the person data record

columns.Name: SETUP_PROFILE_ID
columns.Comments: The setup profile id driving the export data collection.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise id

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
